name: react-installer
description: Mockup ligero del instalador de MC Launch con React, Vite y Electron

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --port 5174 --strictPort" "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5174 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5174 node ../scripts/run-electron.cjs ."
